completed_tasks.name: Create Grafana banking dashboard JSON and smoke test script
End-to-end observability verification
completed_tasks.progress: Smoke test passes 7/7 (after fixing OTel check + arithmetic bug). Transfers succeed. OTel pipeline NOT flowing — banking services not sending traces/metrics/logs to collector. Root cause partially diagnosed: wrong logging property key AND unknown tracing condition failure.

remaining_tasks.name: Identify and fix OTel pipeline root cause, re-run full verification, write 02-03 SUMMARY.md

blockers.description: Banking services not sending any OTel data to collector. Two bugs confirmed: (1) logging property wrong — management.otlp.logging.export.endpoint does not exist, correct key is management.opentelemetry.logging.export.otlp.endpoint. (2) Tracing property management.opentelemetry.tracing.export.otlp.endpoint IS correct per JAR metadata but traces still not flowing — unknown condition failure.
blockers.workaround: Revert logging property fix from commit 6ba6aed. For tracing, run service with LOGGING_LEVEL_ORG_SPRINGFRAMEWORK_BOOT_AUTOCONFIGURE=DEBUG env var to get conditions report.

human_actions_pending.action: Verify Grafana dashboard panels show data after OTel pipeline fix
human_actions_pending.context: Steps 3-6 from 02-03-PLAN.md Task 2 require browser verification (Jaeger, Prometheus, Grafana, Loki)

decisions.decision: smoke-test OTel check changed from -sf (fails on 4xx) to HTTP response code check
decisions.rationale: OTel Collector port 4318 returns 405 on GET — correct behavior, but -sf treats 4xx as failure
Loki 3.7.0 image is distroless (no shell/nc), healthcheck cmd-shell fails. No services depend on service_healthy for loki.

decisions.decision: smoke-test counter increments changed from ((PASS++)) to PASS=$((PASS+1))
decisions.rationale: ((0++)) evaluates to 0 which is falsy under set -e, killing the script after first check
spring-boot-opentelemetry-4.0.5.jar metadata confirms correct key is management.opentelemetry.logging.export.otlp.endpoint. Previous session incorrectly identified the fix.

next_action: Fix management.opentelemetry.logging.export.otlp.endpoint in all 4 application.yml files, then run payment-service with LOGGING_LEVEL_ORG_SPRINGFRAMEWORK_BOOT_AUTOCONFIGURE=DEBUG to get auto-configuration conditions report for tracing, fix whatever is failing, rebuild containers, verify end-to-end pipeline.
context_notes: Spring Boot 4.0.5 OpenTelemetrySdkAutoConfiguration builds SDK from Spring customizer beans, NOT from standard OTEL_* env vars. All export configuration must be via management.opentelemetry.* properties. The OtlpTracingConfigurations$ConnectionDetails has @ConditionalOnProperty on management.opentelemetry.tracing.export.otlp.endpoint — this IS set correctly in application.yml, but traces still not flowing. Debug logging is needed to see which condition actually fails. Worktree agent-ac5d1e82 is behind master and should be deleted after 02-03 is complete.
